seoTitle: Nyrraby vs Oak Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nyrraby and Oak Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Nyrraby vs Oak Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nyrraby and Oak Park.
heading: Nyrraby vs Oak Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nyrraby, Victoria and Oak Park, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nyrraby has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Oak Park (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nyrraby or Oak Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nyrraby has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Oak Park scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nyrraby scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Oak Park scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nyrraby or Oak Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nyrraby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
